_comment: Verbatim extract of the C2SP signed-note PeterNeumann reference vector from golang.org/x/mod/sumdb/note note_test.go. See README.md for source URL, pinned commit, and license. This is the canonical Go sumdb/note KAT — a third-party, independently-implemented signed note that anchors app/federation/checkpoint.py's note wire format. Ed25519 is deterministic (RFC 8032), so a conforming encoder MUST reproduce signed_note byte-for-byte. Newlines are literal; the signature line begins with an em-dash (U+2014).
text:
If you think cryptography is the answer to your problem,
then you don't know what your problem is.
signed_note:
If you think cryptography is the answer to your problem,
then you don't know what your problem is.

— PeterNeumann x08go/ZJkuBS9UG/SffcvIAQxVBtiFupLLr8pAcElZInNIuGUgYN1FFYC2pZSNXgKvqfqdngotpRZb6KE6RyyBwJnAM=
